name: Watercress Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Fish sauce or anchovy paste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the watercress, yogurt, mayonnaise, lemon juice, tarragon, and garlic.
2. Whirl until smooth.
3. Add fish sauce to taste and whirl to blend.
(If making ahead, cover and chill up to one day.)
4. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
